prompt: Cinematic single shot. A warm tungsten desk lamp slowly dims and switches off, transitioning the entire strategy room from warmly lit to near-darkness. The warm pool of light on the wall of pinned index cards fades smoothly, the cards recede into deep navy shadow. The mug, notebook and stool dissolve into silhouette. Subtle final pulse as the filament cools. Locked-off camera, no pan, no zoom, no cuts. Real photographic motion, filmic. No text, no logos, no words. No flicker, no electrical strobe. One smooth continuous dim and out, like an operator pressing the switch and walking out.
